query:
SELECT id, batch_code, period_start, period_end, total_amount, total_workers, status, created_at 
FROM payroll_batches 
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT id, batch_code, period_start, period_end, total_amount, total_workers, status, created_at 
FROM payroll_batches 
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 5;
